task: Cross-sensor anomaly classification of on-the-go proximal soil / yield sensor data
config_notes: seed 42, fixed 15/30/45 m local bands, field-relative motion, uncapped class balancing, no scaler, no raw value, single-stage.
training_data: All expert-labeled points from EM38 ECa, Veris ECa and combine yield (three fields, each preprocessed independently). The annotated dataset itself is not distributed in this repository.

models.random_forest.joblib: sklearn RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=400, class_weight='balanced'). Load with joblib.load().
models.xgboost.json: xgboost XGBClassifier(n_estimators=400, max_depth=6, learning_rate=0.05). Load with XGBClassifier().load_model().
models.heterogat_best_model.pt: HeteroGAT graph neural network checkpoint (torch). The spatially-explicit next-step model; see reta_ml/model.py.

evaluation_note: Headline LOSO (leave-one-sensor-out) results reported on the poster/paper were computed per-fold; these shipped models are trained on ALL labeled data for downstream use.
